 {"id":"gt-fy11w","title":"Daemon patrol should clean stale locks","description":"The gt daemon patrol cycle should detect and clean up stale locks.

## Problem
If daemon crashes or there are orphaned locks, they can block operations indefinitely.

## Proposed Solution
During patrol cycle:
1. Check for lock files older than threshold (e.g., 5 minutes)
2. Verify owning process is dead (check PID if stored)
3. Remove stale locks
4. Log cleanup for audit","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-26T23:13:37.681972-08:00","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2025-12-26T23:13:37.681972-08:00"}
